addVirtualMacNewInfo: Virtual MACs allow for better management of IP addresses by assigning unique MAC addresses to each virtual machine.
addVirtualMacNewInfoGuide: See the guide on virtual MACs
viewVirtualMacQuestion: Here are the details of the virtual MAC:
addVirtualMacAddNewSuccess: A new virtual MAC has been generated and will be available on IP {{t0}} in a few minutes.
addVirtualMacAddNewFailure: An error occurred while generating a new virtual MAC on IP {{t0}}. {{error}} request_id: {{ovhQueryId}}
addVirtualMacAddExistingSuccess: IP {{t0}} will be associated with the existing virtual MAC in a few minutes.
addVirtualMacAddExistingFailure: An error occurred while associating an existing virtual MAC on IP {{t0}}. {{error}} request_id: {{ovhQueryId}}
deleteVirtualMacInfo: Deleting this virtual MAC will cancel the assignment of the associated IP address to the virtual machine, which may disrupt services or configurations that depend on it. This action is irreversible.
deleteVirtualMacConfirmation: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the virtual MAC?
deleteVirtualMacSuccess: The virtual MAC {{vmac}} will be removed from IP {{ip}} in a few minutes.
deleteVirtualMacError: An error occurred while deleting the virtual MAC: {{error}}
